svg.title: From Pain to Venture – Part 03 Reference Images
svg.desc: Reference images for Part 03: Situation, Gap and Solution question map, plus the normal vs abnormal system concept.
svg.text: From Pain to Venture – Part 03 Reference Images
1. Situation, Gap and Solution Question Map
A pre-interview route map: Situation → Gap → Solution hypothesis
Use this before the interview to stay grounded in real data.
Before diagnosing a problem, understand how things are supposed to work.
When normal operations break down, abnormal signals appear.
These abnormal signals are the real data — not what users say they want.
• People hire ways through jobs, not products
• Situation comes before persona — it is harder to fake
• Outcome Expectation: the job is not the action, but the desired result
• Six-part chain must be complete: situation → actor → job → outcome → gap → bottleneck
• Users are poor at designing solutions, but very good at revealing reality
• Interview routing: use Situation & Gap & Solution Pre-planned Questions
"A good interview is not a test of the user's intelligence.
It is an observation of the gap between expectation and reality."
